title.ko: 타의 유체와의 직접접촉에 의하여 또는 펌핑되는 유체의 관성력을 이용하여 유체를 펌핑하는 것(내부의 가스압에 의하여 유체 또는 반액체의 내용물을 분배하기 위한 특수한 수단이 있는 용기 또는 포장 B65D 83/14); 사이폰
title.en: PUMPING OF FLUID BY DIRECT CONTACT OF ANOTHER FLUID OR BY USING INERTIA OF FLUID TO BE PUMPED (containers or packages with special means for dispensing liquid or semi-liquid contents by internal gaseous pressure B65D0083140000); SIPHONS

definition.ko: 기타 유체의 흐름 또는 압력을 이용하는 펌프 F04F1/00, F04F5/00 부압력을 사용하는 펌프; 유체의 관성력을 사용하는 펌프 F04F1/00, F04F3/00; 7/00 확산펌프, 예. 보조펌프를 가지는 것 F04F9/00 사이폰; 그 외의 펌프 F04F10/00; F04F99/00 압력 교환기 F04F13/00 제트펌프 장치 F04F5/54

title.ko: 펌핑되어야 할 유체에 직접 작용하는 정 또는 부로 가압된 유체매체를 사용하는 펌프(부압력만을 사용하는 것 F04F 3/00; 제트펌프 F04F 5/00; 사이폰 F04F 10/00)
title.en: Pumps using positively or negatively pressurised fluid medium acting directly on the liquid to be pumped (using only negative pressure F04F0003000000;jet pumps F04F0005000000;siphons F04F0010000000)
using both positively and negatively pressurised fluid medium, e.g. alternating
generated by vaporising and condensing

title.ko: 유체매체가 펌핑되어야 액체의 표면에 작용하는 것(F04F 1/02가 우선)
title.en: the fluid medium acting on the surface of the liquid to be pumped (F04F0001020000 takes precedence)
specially adapted for raising liquids from great depths, e.g. in wells

title.ko: 다중형의, 예. 평행한 2개 이상의 유닛이 있는 것 (F04F1/08이 우선)
title.en: of multiple type, e.g. with two or more units in parallel (F04F0001080000 takes precedence)
in series
adapted to pump specific liquids, e.g. corrosive or hot liquids
characterised by the fluid medium being suddenly pressurised, e.g. by explosion
the fluid medium being mixed with, or generated from, the liquid to be pumped
specially adapted for raising liquids from great depths, e.g. in wells

title.ko: 펌핑되어야 할 유체에 직접 작용하는 부압력을 사용하는 펌프(사이폰 F04F 10/00)
title.en: Pumps using negative pressure acting directly on the liquid to be pumped (siphons F04F0010000000)

title.ko: 제트펌프, 즉 유체의 흐름이 타의 유체의 흐름의 속도에 의하여 일어나는 압력강하에 의하여 유도되는 장치(확산펌프 F04F 9/00; 타의 펌프와 조합된 제트펌프 F04B; 비용적형 펌프의 프라이밍(priming) 또는 부스팅(boosting)을 위하여 제트펌프를 사용하는 것 F04D)
title.en: Jet pumps, i.e. devices in which fluid flow is induced by pressure drop caused by velocity of another fluid flow (diffusion pumps F04F0009000000;combination of jet pumps with pumps of other than jet type F04B;use of jet pumps for priming or boosting non-positive-displacement pumps F04D)
the inducing fluid being liquid
displacing elastic fluids
of rotary type
the elastic fluid being entrained in a free-falling column of liquid
displacing liquids, e.g. containing solids, or liquids and elastic fluids
of multi-stage type
the inducing fluid being elastic fluid
displacing elastic fluids
for compressing
for evacuating
of multi-stage type

title.ko: 액체를 송출하는 것, 예. 고체 또는 액체 및 압축성 유체를 포함하는 것
title.en: displacing liquids, e.g. containing solids, or liquids and elastic fluids
of multi-stage type (F04F0005280000 takes precedence)
Restarting of inducing action
with axially-slidable combining nozzle
with hinged flap in combining nozzle
characterised by means for changing inducing-fluid source
characterised by using specific inducing fluid
the inducing fluid being mercury vapour
the inducing fluid being oil vapour

title.ko: 분사유체매체의 입구유동이 출구유동에 대하여 반경 또는 접선방향인 것에 특징이 있는 것(사이클론 B40C)
title.en: characterised by the input flow of inducing fluid medium being radial or tangential to output flow (cyclones B04C)

title.ko: 그룹 F04F 5/02에서 F04F 5/42로 분류되지 않는 구성부재, 세부 또는 부속품
title.en: Component parts, details, or accessories not provided for in, or of interest apart from, groups F04F0005020000-F04F0005420000
Arrangements of nozzles
Control
of compressing pumps
of evacuating pumps
Installations characterised by use of jet pumps, e.g. combinations of two or more jet pumps of different type
Pumps displacing fluids by using inertia thereof, e.g. by generating vibrations therein
Hydraulic rams
Diffusion pumps
of multi-stage type
in combination with fore pumps, e.g. use of isolating valves
Arrangement of vapour traps
Control
Siphons
Gravity-actuated siphons
Pressure exchangers
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
